Active.description: Indicates that promocode is active. Default: **true**

ActivationDate.description: The date of the promocode activation. Default: **today’s date**

ExpirationDate.description: The date of the promocode expiration. Default: **a months from today’s date**

MaxUses.description: The maximun number of uses. A use is considered a single sale.

DaysAfterCloseDate.description: The number of days a client has to use a promocode after they are no longer a prospect.

AllowOnline.description: Indicates if promocode can be redeemed online in consumer mode. Default: **false**

DaysValid.description: Indicates what days of the week promocode is valid. Defaults to 7 days of the week. Possible values are: * Monday * Tuesday * Wednesday * Thursday * Friday * Saturday * Sunday

ApplicableItems.description: Contains information about a promocode applicable items. See ApplicableItems for a details of the `ApplicableItems` object.
